# Choose Auth And Hosting

Use this prompt with any AI coding tool:

```text
Read this repository first. Help me choose the safest auth and hosting path for my HubSpot project.

Ask me one question at a time. Do not ask for secrets. Explain the tradeoffs between mock mode, HubSpot serverless functions, external serverless functions, private app token local testing, and OAuth.

At the end, recommend one path and list the files you would edit next.
```
